description: hex autonomous agent system with SSE streaming, native tools, Docker workers, steering, and outcomes — feature parity with Anthropic Managed Agents

tasks.name: SSE streaming handler in hex-nexus
tasks.description: Add axum SSE endpoint for /api/sessions/{id}/stream that subscribes to SpacetimeDB
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-nexus -- sse_stream 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: SpacetimeDB subscription infrastructure
tasks.description: Add subscribe reducer for real-time event emission
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hexflo-coordination 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: hex_bash MCP tool
tasks.description: Implement allowlisted command execution in hex-agent with blocking of dangerous patterns (rm -rf /, git push --force)
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-agent 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: hex_web_search MCP tool
tasks.description: Implement web search using reqwest with configurable allowlist
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-agent 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: hex_web_fetch MCP tool
tasks.description: Implement URL fetch with domain allowlist checking
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-agent 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Outcomes schema in workplan
tasks.description: Add outcomes field to workplan JSON schema and parsing in hex-core
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-core 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Docker worker P0: task metadata enrichment
tasks.description: Enrich task metadata with full WorkplanStep JSON and output_dir when creating HexFlo tasks
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-cli 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Docker worker P1: real hex-coder worker
tasks.description: Implement real hex-coder worker that deserializes WorkplanStep, calls CodePhase, writes files, stores result
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-cli 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Docker worker P2: supervisor result handling
tasks.description: Supervisor reads worker result from hexflo memory and updates ObjectiveState
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-cli 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Docker worker P3: HEX_OUTPUT_DIR env var
tasks.description: Set HEX_OUTPUT_DIR environment variable when spawning workers
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-cli 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Docker worker P4: enable delegation
tasks.description: Remove if false && guard in supervisor.rs and enable worker delegation (completes ADR-2603291900)
tasks.done_condition: cargo check --package hex-cli && cargo test --package hex-cli -- worker_delegation
tasks.done_command: cargo check -p hex-cli 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Steering API: events endpoint
tasks.description: POST /api/sessions/{id}/events to send events to running agent
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-nexus 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Environment API
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-nexus 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Steering API: interrupt endpoint
tasks.description: POST /api/sessions/{id}/interrupt to cancel current tool and restart
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-nexus 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Outcomes evaluator
tasks.description: Implement outcome evaluator that runs compile/test checks and streams results
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-cli 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Session API
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-nexus 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Session SSE wiring
tasks.description: Wire SSE streaming to session lifecycle events
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-nexus 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Full autonomous pipeline integration test
tasks.description: Full pipeline with workplan → Docker worker → SSE → outcome → complete without human intervention
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-cli 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

successCriteria: Full pipeline runs autonomously: hex plan execute completes without human intervention
SSE delivers task events within 1 second
Workers execute code and generate files to output_dir
Integration test passes with full autonomy
